All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
CreateEventActivity
Activity for organizers to create new events.
Event
Model class representing an Event.
EventDetailsActivity
Activity to display the details of a specific event.
EventValidationUtils
Utility class for validating event-related data.
LotteryApplication
Base class for maintaining global application state.
MainActivity
MainActivity serves as the primary dashboard for the application.
QRCodeUtils
Utility class for QR code related operations.
UploadPosterDialogFragment
DialogFragment for handling event poster selection and preview.
